message:
feat: expand safety service tests + add pipeline/checkpoint/agent service stubs

safety.service.test.ts:
- Expand test coverage from basic assertions to comprehensive input
  validation, edge cases, and error handling paths

db/connection.ts:
- Add missing import for auto-migration support

services:
- agent.ts: add agent activity tracking stub
- checkpoint.ts: add checkpoint snapshot stub
- git.service.ts: improve error context on git operations
- pipeline.service.ts: expand pipeline step handling with retry logic

Beads sync: added new tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
